scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/testing packages/engine-kysely packages/dialect-sqlite packages/plugins packages/migrations packages/cli packages/decorators packages/dialect-postgres packages/dialect-mysql packages/dialect-mssql packages/adapters
scripts.test:containers: ORMIT_TESTCONTAINERS=1 vitest run packages/dialect-postgres packages/dialect-mysql packages/dialect-mssql
scripts.gate: pnpm build && pnpm check:deps && pnpm test:types && pnpm test:coverage
